title: Stars and Bars Method for Combinations with Repetition
description: A visual representation of selecting k items from n types with repetition allowed, using stars to represent items and bars to separate types.
elements: Bars (|) representing dividers between different types/categories
Slots representing the n types available for selection
relationships: Stars and bars are arranged in a sequence where the number of stars before the first bar represents items of type 1, between bars represents items of type 2, and after the last bar represents items of type n
